chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. R.A.No. 230 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For hearing of CMA 2498/2024. 2. For hearing of main case. 07.05.2026. Mr. Muhammad Nouman Jaffar, Advocate for respondents. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional A.G, Sindh. = None present for applicant. No intimation is received. Counsel for the respondents submits that this revision has become infructuous as the learned 7th Additional District Judge, Hyderabad in Summary Suit No.22/2024 has already passed the judgment and decree dated 30.05.2025. Further he submits that a challenge raised against the said judgment in an appeal No.S- 55/2025 before this Court was also dismissed vide judgment dated 04.09.2025. The statement attaching the copy of judgments and decree both in summary and suit in appeal, is placed on record by way of statement dated 07.05.2026. In view of the same this revision application has become infructuous and the same is dismissed in the above terms along with listed application. JUDGE Tufail
